title: AutoEnergy: An automated feature engineering algorithm for energy consumption forecasting with AutoML
description_es: Este trabajo introduce AutoEnergy, un algoritmo de ingeniería automática de características específicamente diseñado para tareas de predicción de consumo de energía.
abstract: Feature engineering plays a crucial role in machine learning pipelines, yet it remains a time-consuming process requiring domain expertise. This paper introduces AutoEnergy, a novel domain-aware feature engineering algorithm tailored for energy consumption forecasting. AutoEnergy automatically generates interpretable features through rule-based transformations, significantly improving predictive accuracy while reducing computational overhead.

citations.apa: Alkhulaifi, N., Bowler, A. L., Pekaslan, D., Watson, N. J., & Triguero, I. (2025). AutoEnergy: An automated feature engineering algorithm for energy consumption forecasting with AutoML. Knowledge-Based Systems, 329, 114300.
citations.mla: Alkhulaifi, Nasser, et al. "AutoEnergy: An automated feature engineering algorithm for energy consumption forecasting with AutoML." Knowledge-Based Systems, vol. 329, 2025, p. 114300.

contributions: Automated feature engineering for energy prediction
